title: がんばれ！ウララのド根性

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: One, two! One, two! And... finish!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Okay, one lap down, another lap to go!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: One, two! One, two! One, two!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even on the final day of Tracen Academy's summer camp, the hopeful
underdog is hard at work.

text_block_list.name: Reporter
text_block_list.text:
Looks like Haru Urara's as bright as ever. Even the summer sun can't
outshine her!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her fan I met at the scrimmage seems to be writing a piece on the
summer camp. I watch as the giddy reporter happily snaps pictures.

text_block_list.name: Reporter
text_block_list.text:
I'd love to stay and watch, but I've got another assignment. I took
some great pictures, though, so I'll send them to you ASAP!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Haru Urara and I train for the rest of the day. At the end, the
exhausted racer comes up to me, eyes full of expectations.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Huff... puff... I'm beat! But I did it! I finished the whole run!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Yeah, I bet I'm much faster now! How was my time?!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Wh-why are you so quiet?! What was my time on that last lap?!
choice_data_list: You still didn't beat your record...
You still didn't beat your record...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Ohhh! Darn it! Then I'll do one more lap right no—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Gurgle.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Ah... Hehe, looks like I worked up more of an appetite than I thought!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Mmm! Crepes, cakes, candied carrots... Everything I try is so good!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Haru Urara and I have come to a local festival, both as a reward for
her hard work and a means to replenish her energy.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: If there's anything you want to eat, I'll get it for you lickety-split!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Ehehe, I love festivals! ♪ Thanks for bringing me here!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Hehehe! ♪ Ah! Look, they've got a ring toss game! Now THAT brings
back memories!

text_block_list.name: Farmer
text_block_list.text: Urara? Is that you?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Oh, hello, Mr. Farmer! Are you having fun too?

text_block_list.name: Farmer
text_block_list.text:
That's my line! You must be taking a break from training. How was
summer camp?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Well... I ran a whooole bunch, so I had a blast!

text_block_list.name: Farmer
text_block_list.text:
I see. Well, that's all that matters! Will I see the results of your hard
work at the next race?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
You bet! I KNOW I'll be taking home the gold this time. You won't
want to miss out!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After that heartfelt declaration, Haru Urara and I say our goodbyes to
the carrot farmer.
choice_data_list: Shall we call it a day?
Shall we call it a day?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Um... Hey, would it be okay if we stayed just a liiittle bit more?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Together, we return to the moonlit beach.
choice_data_list: Something you want to do here?
Something you want to do here?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: I just want to do one more lap before we head home!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
I've worked so hard here, so I want to end on a high note and get just
a teensy bit faster!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: So please, time my last lap of the summer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Haru Urara makes her way to the starting position with a more serious
expression than usual.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Ready when you are! Just give me the signal!
choice_data_list: On your mark... Get set... Go!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: One, two! One, two! One, two! One, two!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Finiiish! Huff, puff... How was that?! What's my time?!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Ohhh, drat! I thought I beat it for sure!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: When we get back, I'm gonna work even harder! I will get faster and finally take first place!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Haru Urara's cries of determination echo from the beach to the ocean
horizon. Surely she's feeling frustrated at her lack of progress.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I, however, know for a fact that she has improved. In order to prove
it, I take out my phone.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I show her two of the photos the reporter sent me. One is from the
first time the two met, and the other is from today's training.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Oh, that's me! But why are you showing me this now?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Huh?! Wh-what do you mean? N-no one's ever said that about me
before.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Looking at the two photos, it's clear that her running form has
improved. She's running in a much more efficient way now.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I explain to her that at this rate, it's only a matter of time before her
speed increases.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Really? Then... does that mean I got better?!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Of course I trust you! But wow! That means I really am improving!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: And I couldn't have done it without you! I'm so glad you're my trainer!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: I've always known I could win if I put my mind to it, but now I really know!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: And I hope you're ready, 'cause once we're back at Tracen, I'm giving practice a hundred and ten percent!
